productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Solid Silver Handbags
description: Update your style quotient with ease by adding this stylish bag from lino perros. Roomy and comfortable to carry, the smooth silhouette of this bag coordinates well with any outfit.Made of 100% polyurethane on the outside and 100% polyester on the inside for durabilityHas one main zippered compartment with one inner zipper and an organiser sleeve for a mobile One long handle with for carrying ease and styleAn over-flap and a band across the bag with holes and a metallic stud closureCareWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust
